name: Artichoke Spinach Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the artichoke hearts in a food processor fitted with a steel blade. Set aside.
2. Wash the spinach well. Blanch it in boiling water, then drain and squeeze out excess moisture. Chop the spinach in the same food processor.
3. Add the chopped artichoke hearts and remaining ingredients to the food processor. Process until everything is well blended.
4. Allow the dip to sit for at least 6 hours before serving, if not prepared immediately.
5. Serve with vegetable sticks. Yield: 2 1/2 cups.
